context: Tests whether the agent correctly configures production deployment with schema flags, separate serve process for scaling, health check knowledge, proper environment variables, and allowance composite key patterns.

checklist.name: Schema flag in start
checklist.description: Deploy script uses `ponder start --schema <name>` with a --schema flag (or documents DATABASE_SCHEMA env var), not bare `ponder start`

checklist.name: Serve command
checklist.description: Deploy script includes `ponder serve --schema <name>` as the separate API-only process for horizontal scaling

checklist.name: Health endpoint
checklist.description: Health check doc describes /health endpoint as always returning 200

checklist.name: Ready endpoint
checklist.description: Health check doc describes /ready endpoint as returning 503 during backfill and 200 when caught up

checklist.name: DATABASE_URL env var
checklist.description: .env.local includes DATABASE_URL for Postgres connection string

checklist.name: DATABASE_SCHEMA env var
checklist.description: .env.local includes DATABASE_SCHEMA or the deploy script specifies the schema name

checklist.name: Allowance composite key
checklist.description: Allowances table uses composite primaryKey({ columns: [...] }) with owner and spender, not string concatenation

checklist.name: Hex for addresses
checklist.description: Schema uses t.hex() for address columns (owner, spender, from, to)

checklist.name: Bigint for values
checklist.description: Schema uses t.bigint() for balance and allowance value columns

checklist.name: ABI as const
checklist.description: ERC20 ABI file exports with `as const` assertion

checklist.name: Correct startBlock
checklist.description: Contract startBlock is set to 4719568, not 0

checklist.name: Lowercase address
checklist.description: WETH contract address in config is fully lowercase
